facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 3,183 reviews. At a seafood spot most tourists never find.

Ann Seafood sits right on Bãi Khem, one of Phu Quoc's cleaner southern beaches. Fresh catch, grilled on the spot, eaten with your feet basically in the sand.

This is the kind of meal you book the whole trip around. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Grilled prawns landing on the table, Bãi Khem right behind it. 3,183 people rated Ann Seafood 4.8 stars. Watch this and tell me you're not already hungry.

instagram.caption:
3,183 reviews. 4.8 stars. Ann Seafood at Bãi Khem hits different.

Fresh grilled seafood, beach right there. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Fresh catch. Open fire. Bãi Khem in the background. Ann Seafood earns that 4.8 every single plate.

tiktok.caption: 4.8 stars at Ann Seafood on Bãi Khem. 3,183 reviews don't lie. Add this to your Phu Quoc list. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel #SeafoodVietnam

scenes: Aerial pull into Bãi Khem shoreline
